my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
note: Implementation complete: added error_threshold=None as the last param in quantize() (right after dither), added a small _quantize_mse(self, quantized_im) helper method just above quantize(), and inserted logic near the self.im.quantize(colors, method, kmeans) call that iterates candidate color counts up to 'colors' and stops once MSE <= error_threshold (else falls back to 'colors'). Added 3 new test functions at the end of test_image_quantize.py (test_quantize_error_threshold_reduces_colors, test_quantize_error_threshold_uses_max_colors, test_quantize_error_threshold_met).
